items.name: context-matic
items.description: ContextMatic turns your AI agents from API-guessers into API-experts. By feeding agents exact, version-aware SDK methods and typed models for providers like PayPal, Spotify, and Twilio, ContextMatic replaces guesswork and outdated training data with high-fidelity ground truth.
